# cloudfly_snapshot (Resource)

Manages a CloudFly instance snapshot.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudfly_snapshot" "example" {
  instance_id = cloudfly_instance.example.id
  name        = "before-upgrade"
  description = "Snapshot before system upgrade"
}

resource "cloudfly_snapshot" "clean" {
  instance_id = cloudfly_instance.example.id
  name        = "post-install"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `os_distro` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `size_in_gb` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import cloudfly_snapshot.example "<instance-id>/<snapshot-id>"
```
